arts.sum: The Brazilian will expectedly miss the rest of the season with a second torn ACL in as many seasons.

arts.ttl: Viní Jr. nets hat trick as Madrid thrash Osasuna
arts.sum: Real Madrid forward Vinícius Júnior scored a hat trick to help the LaLiga champions snap a two-game winless run in all competitions with a commanding 4-0 victory over Osasuna.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid left fearing the worst as key man suffers serious-looking injury vs. Osasuna
arts.sum: Real Madrid's 4-0 win over Osasuna in La Liga on Saturday afternoon comes at a serious cost, with Rodrygo, Eder Militao and Lucas Vazquez all being forced off with injuries.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid's Vinicius Junior Responds to Ballon d'Or Snub with Hat Trick vs. Osasuna
arts.sum: Vinícius Júnior kicked off his new Ballon d'Or campaign with a hat trick in Real Madrid's 4–0 victory over Osasuna.
